title: Golden German Rice Dumplings
description: A fluffy, bouncy rice dumpling dish flavored with sweet rice flour, fresh dill and pickled cucumber, perfect for a solo halal-friendly dinner.
instructions: In a bowl, mix sweet rice flour, baking powder, and salt.
Add warm water and stir until a smooth, elastic dough forms.
Knead the dough for 2 minutes, then let it rest for 10 minutes.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each into a small ball.
Heat a skillet over medium heat and lightly oil it.
Place the dumplings in the skillet, cooking 3 minutes per side until golden.
Serve hot, garnished with dill, lemon zest, and pickled cucumber.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
